text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama, want to go for some cake together?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ah, sorry but... I'm gonna have to turn ya down.
I've been cuttin' back on the sweet stuff lately.
My clothes were gettin' a little tight.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I see... In that case, we can go skip the buffet
places.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that's not the problem... 'Sides, you know I
tend to eat light.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What about having crepes instead, then?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I like the sound of that! Crepes are thin and
crispy, so I could probably get one down. ...Wait
a sec, what am I sayin'?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm on a diet here! Just hang in there till I get back in shape!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Keeping her sweet tooth in check, Tamamo Cross
stays on track with her diet.
